title: Kasba Patāspur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kasba Patāspur with a Z-Score of +3.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Kasba Patāspur is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 83%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is 11.9 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
